tools_subtitle: Introducing tools useful for API vulnerability assessment, testing, and monitoring.
tools_dast_heading: 🔎 Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) Tools
tools_dast_description: Tools that send requests to running APIs to detect vulnerabilities.
tools_burp_title: Burp Suite Commercial / Free Edition Available
tools_burp_description: The industry-standard tool for web application and API security testing. Proxy-based interception and scanning capabilities.
tools_burp_feature4: Repeater: Manual request replay and verification
tools_burp_tip_desc: Import an OpenAPI/Swagger definition to automatically crawl and test all endpoints.
tools_zap_description: An open-source security testing tool developed by OWASP. Easy to integrate into CI/CD pipelines.
tools_postman_description: The go-to tool for API development and testing. Also useful for security testing.
tools_postman_feature1: Organize test cases with the Collections feature
tools_postman_feature2: Switch between staging/production with environment variables
tools_postman_feature4: Automate response validation in the Tests tab
tools_curl_description: Quick API testing from the command line. Easy to script and automate.
tools_sast_heading: 📊 Static Analysis (SAST) & Software Composition Analysis (SCA)
tools_semgrep_description: A pattern-based static analysis tool. Easy to create custom rules.
tools_semgrep_feature1: Multi-language support (JS, Python, Go, Java, etc.)
tools_snyk_description: Dependency vulnerability scanning and code analysis.
tools_snyk_feature1: Dependency scanning for npm, pip, Maven, etc.
tools_npm_audit_description: Vulnerability checking for package managers and containers.
tools_npm_audit_feature3: Trivy: Containers, IaC, and file systems
tools_swagger_description: Define API specifications in a machine-readable format. Also used as input for security testing.
tools_swagger_feature1: Comprehensive definition of endpoints, parameters, and responses
tools_swagger_feature2: Explicit security schemes (OAuth, API Key, etc.)
tools_swagger_feature3: Import into ZAP/Burp to automate testing
tools_swagger_feature4: Interactive documentation generation with Swagger UI
tools_spectral_description: A linter tool for OpenAPI specifications. Checks compliance with security best practices.
tools_spectral_feature1: Check for the presence of security scheme definitions
tools_spectral_feature3: Enforce internal policies with custom rules
tools_spectral_feature4: Quality gate for API specs in CI/CD
tools_gateway_description: Kong, AWS API Gateway, Apigee, and others.
tools_waf_description: AWS WAF, Cloudflare, ModSecurity, and others.
tools_waf_feature1: Block attack patterns such as SQLi/XSS
tools_siem_description: ELK Stack, Splunk, Datadog, and others.
